title: Crispy Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful fried rice dish perfect for a quick meal. This recipe combines the crunch of fried ingredients with the comfort of rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the egg and scramble it until cooked through, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the fried shallots and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the wok or skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute, until the rice is well coated.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the crispy fried rice to a serving platter and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional fried shallots and soy sauce if desired.
